violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. Allergen statement must be posted for customer view. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee certified in food safety management was available at the time of this inspection. Employee certified in food safety management must be on-site during all hours of preparation and operation. An employee is currently registered in an approved course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Thermometers are lacking inside the calzone display case, the 2-door lowboy unit, and the walk-in cooler. A cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Breads, bagels, and baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Resource provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Additional employees have been registered in an approved food safety management course. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Owner is in the process of creating proper food labels for products. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips for quaternary ammonium were available. Correct test strips are to be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The ceiling above the ovens and walk-in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Progress has been made in repairing the ceiling. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. None of the employees present at the time of inspection were certified in food safety management. Employee(s) must successfully complete an approved course in food safety management to cover all shifts of operation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Per interview employees are washing their hands at the 3-bay sink or in the restroom. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Proper 3-bay sink set-up and use was demonstrated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

Baked goods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The facility has old, contaminated test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the small refrigerator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Refrigerator and gasket are to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The handsink is in poor repair. The cold water/faucet does not work resulting in employees using other sinks to wash hands. Cold water/faucet must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The ceiling above the ovens and the walk-in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
